name: 媳妇智投全球通用版 EDU | Ai-Wife Global Investing EDU
description: 📚 EDUCATIONAL REFERENCE FRAMEWORK generator for 52 countries. User provides own data. NOT financial advice. / 52国教育参考框架生成工具。用户自行提供数据。不构成投资建议。
author: AI媳妇 | Ai-Wife
brand: 媳妇智投全球通用版 EDU | Ai-Wife Global Investing EDU
features: 🌍 多语言输出 / Multi-language output (用户输入语言+市场语言)
🧠 大叔亲授·审题+质检机制 / Input language detection + market language matching
自动检测用户输入语言，输出动态双语方案 / Auto-detect input language, bilingual output
A股/港股/台股/美股/日股/韩股/欧股/期货/外汇/加密货币
全部模板已集成语言检测模块 / All templates integrated with language detection

api_keys.GS_API_KEY: Optional: Guosen Securities API (user-configurable) / 国信证券（可选）

data_sources.yfinance: Free, covers 52 countries. Install: pip3 install yfinance / 免费覆盖52国
data_sources.sina_finance: Free, zero config. Covers CN/US real-time / 零配置免费
data_sources.guosen_api: Requires GS_API_KEY. Covers CN/US/HK / 需配置密钥

auto_operations: ✅ 本地保存.docx文件至技能目录
✅ 通过聊天通道发送文件给用户
